caption: A man with glasses and long hair tied back performs music in an indoor setting against a backdrop of light-colored horizontal blinds. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt, a dark vest with blue embroidered floral patterns, and a red beaded necklace. He stands behind a microphone on a stand and plays a light-colored stringed instrument. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, suggesting an audience. A white logo with the text "ORCA" is superimposed on the right side of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in position, speaking or singing into the microphone while his hands move slightly to play the instrument. The scene is static, with only the man's subtle facial expressions and hand movements changing as he performs.
